focus: whether she will emotionally recover and be okay after her divorce
cardReadingDirection: Yes — you are going to be okay; the spread shows a healing arc that is already underway, with the hardest strain of the divorce mostly behind you. Card 1 (The Star) = your recovery happens through quiet, honest rebuilding — gently reconnecting with the friendships, routines, and small pleasures that still respond to you, not through a dramatic reinvention or rushing into a new relationship. Card 2 (Nine of Swords) = the remaining pain now lives mostly in your late-night thoughts rather than your actual circumstances, so protect your energy with firm boundaries on rumination — no replaying arguments or making divorce-related decisions after evening. Card 3 (Temperance) = being okay comes from integrating your married past with your single present at a moderate pace — keep what worked in your old life (people, habits, places) and blend it into the new one instead of erasing everything. Concrete step: today, list three areas that still respond well to your effort (one friendship, one habit, one personal goal), schedule a specific small action for each this week, and set a nightly cut-off time after which divorce thoughts get written into a notebook and closed until morning.
